title: Headquarters XXI Bomber Command, Tactical Mission Report, Mission No. 40 Flown 10 March 1945
author_or_org: National Security Archive / XXI Bomber Command record
strengths: Archival gateway for the contemporaneous mission report; preserves the official figure of 83,793 killed and more than 40,000 injured.
limitations: Landing page summarizes the archival document rather than reproducing the whole report inline.
notes: Key excerpt paraphrase: official figure 83,793 killed, 40,000+ injured, over 1 million homeless.

title: Bombing of Tokyo (10 March 1945)
author_or_org: Wikipedia synthesis of cited historical sources
strengths: Conveniently surfaces the target-box population and the main same-night casualty estimates in one place.
limitations: Secondary compilation rather than a primary statistical source; denominator should ideally be replaced by a direct Japanese archival demographic source.
notes: Key figures: target-box population around 1.1 million; 79,466 bodies recovered; city health director 83,600 killed; fire department 97,000 killed.

title: Bombing of Tokyo
strengths: Useful cross-check on event framing and conservative death-toll language.
limitations: Does not supply the same degree of target-area denominator detail as the specialized sources.
notes: Cross-check: at least 80,000 killed, likely more than 100,000.
